ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Patient's insurance ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_value_type" TEXT /* Type of the data value (e.g., string, numeric, date) */,
  "data_value_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value (e.g., mmHg for blood pressure) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_validated" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the data has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., EHR, claims, registry) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection from the source */,
  "source_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "type_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent data type (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "type_icon" TEXT /* Icon or symbol representing the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocabularies" (
  "vocabulary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_name" TEXT /* Name of the vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_description" TEXT /* Description of the vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_version" TEXT /* Version of the vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_url" TEXT /* URL where the vocabulary can be accessed */,
  "vocabulary_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vocabulary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocabulary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, healthcare professional, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the organization */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance event */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation or standard being complied with */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Description of the regulation or standard */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when compliance was achieved */,
  "compliance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compliance event */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_responsible" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for the compliance */,
  "compliance_documents" TEXT /* Names or URLs of documents related to the compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)
